So many important topics came up -- and while we heard a lot of big ideas, there was an obvious absence of candidates who have proven they can deliver results. But here's why we're not discouraged:
**[You've gotten us 38.4% closer to our goal. Contribute $1 today to help this campaign keep fighting for working people.](https://act.billdeblasio.com/page/m/6bf21cf5/1630b3eb/515b2836/5f549f0f/2343750271/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjczMCJ9/?g=VmvkeFNw52hdLWhQmfUOXQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/qualify?refcode=730_org_em_fr_seg1")**

name: Presidential Candidate Joe Sestak
subject: I was an expert marksman
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Joe Sestak for President
body:
Peter,
I qualified as a firearms expert in the Navy. As an Admiral, I went with crews as they boarded ships with assault weapons looking for contraband. And I have such respect for those who hunt or have weapons at home for self-protection. **But assault weapons are not what we want on our streets.** I**know what weapons of war are, and I know that they do not belong in American communities. The horrifying mass shootings of recent years should be all the proof our lawmakers need to finally take action. **
**[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/9958143/99365499/-803653937?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NjQwMTM5OC1jMmQ3LWU5MTEtYjVlOS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-vR3umYQ5dEziHFqH0rfq1HPr4hjbzDOwAmjeAIgHGg=&emci=bf9efd45-31d7-e911-b5e9-2818784d6d68&emdi=96401398-c2d7-e911-b5e9-2818784d6d68&ceid=250798&v=hCcsNIISiWo)**
**Too many families have lost loved ones. Too many children are scared. Too many Americans die every year because we are not able, as a country, to pass sensible gun safety and gun control laws** that would take weapons of war out of people's hands and prevent dangerous or unstable individuals from obtaining firearms. I was inspired by Stephanie Phillips's "Final Kiss Goodbye" (listen [here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/9958144/99365505/-1790801775?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NjQwMTM5OC1jMmQ3LWU5MTEtYjVlOS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-vR3umYQ5dEziHFqH0rfq1HPr4hjbzDOwAmjeAIgHGg=&emci=bf9efd45-31d7-e911-b5e9-2818784d6d68&emdi=96401398-c2d7-e911-b5e9-2818784d6d68&ceid=250798)): as a parent, I cannot stand idly by. **I've shared a few thoughts[here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/9958146/99365514/675769400?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NjQwMTM5OC1jMmQ3LWU5MTEtYjVlOS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-vR3umYQ5dEziHFqH0rfq1HPr4hjbzDOwAmjeAIgHGg=&emci=bf9efd45-31d7-e911-b5e9-2818784d6d68&emdi=96401398-c2d7-e911-b5e9-2818784d6d68&ceid=250798).**
**[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/9958148/99365520/1036341175?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NjQwMTM5OC1jMmQ3LWU5MTEtYjVlOS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-vR3umYQ5dEziHFqH0rfq1HPr4hjbzDOwAmjeAIgHGg=&refcode=em09152019guns)**
I would **close the “gun show loophole”** (which allows people to avoid background checks by buying guns at gun shows and conventions or from other “private sellers”), **close the “gun kit” or “ghost gun” loophol**e (which allows people to buy portions of guns that are easy to assemble into functioning firearms), and create a more effective **national background check system** , including by enabling states to **add felons, domestic abusers, and other violent criminals to the background check database**. I also believe we must once again **ban assault weapons and high capacity magazines**.
But we must also address the gun issue from a **public health** standpoint. We need to repeal the Dickey Amendment, a law preventing the Centers for Disease Control from making recommendations on how to deal with the public health threat of guns. And the changes I propose to our healthcare system described in the Healthcare portion of my “Plan for America” would dramatically **improve access to mental health services for all Americans, which itself should help to reduce gun deaths**.
**[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/9958150/99365526/1036341175?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NjQwMTM5OC1jMmQ3LWU5MTEtYjVlOS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-vR3umYQ5dEziHFqH0rfq1HPr4hjbzDOwAmjeAIgHGg=&refcode=em09152019guns)**
**As a former Navy Admiral who represented a 2-to-1 Republican district in the U.S. House of Representatives despite an "F" from the NRA, I know I am uniquely qualified to bring this country together to unite around a sensible path to responsible gun control.** If you agree, **please contribute.**
Respectfully,
Joe Sestak

clean_body: Peter, I qualified as a firearms expert in the Navy. As an Admiral, I went with crews as they boarded ships with assault weapons looking for contraband. And I have such respect for those who hunt or have weapons at home for self-protection. But assault weapons are not what we want on our streets. Iknow what weapons of war are, and I know that they do not belong in American communities. The horrifying mass shootings of recent years should be all the proof our lawmakers need to finally take action. Too many families have lost loved ones. Too many children are scared. Too many Americans die every year because we are not able, as a country, to pass sensible gun safety and gun control laws that would take weapons of war out of people's hands and prevent dangerous or unstable individuals from obtaining firearms. I was inspired by Stephanie Phillips's "Final Kiss Goodbye" (listen ): as a parent, I cannot stand idly by. I've shared a few thoughts. I would close the “gun show loophole” (which allows people to avoid background checks by buying guns at gun shows and conventions or from other “private sellers”), close the “gun kit” or “ghost gun” loophole (which allows people to buy portions of guns that are easy to assemble into functioning firearms), and create a more effective national background check system , including by enabling states to add felons, domestic abusers, and other violent criminals to the background check database. I also believe we must once again ban assault weapons and high capacity magazines. But we must also address the gun issue from a public health standpoint. We need to repeal the Dickey Amendment, a law preventing the Centers for Disease Control from making recommendations on how to deal with the public health threat of guns. And the changes I propose to our healthcare system described in the Healthcare portion of my “Plan for America” would dramatically improve access to mental health services for all Americans, which itself should help to reduce gun deaths. As a former Navy Admiral who represented a 2-to-1 Republican district in the U.S. House of Representatives despite an "F" from the NRA, I know I am uniquely qualified to bring this country together to unite around a sensible path to responsible gun control. If you agree, please contribute. Respectfully, Joe Sestak Come on board. We encourage you to and get involved in these challenging and wonderful times. Paid for by Joe Sestak for President. name: Team Sestak
subject: NEW DATE! JOIN PRESIDENTIAL CANDIDATE, Admiral Joe Sestak, FOR AN IMPORTANT EVENING ABOUT AMERICA'S FUTURE - Monday, September 23
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Joe Sestak for President
body:
NEW DATE: Monday, September 23

In a time of uncertainty, with Twitter-fed presidential leadership, an economy on the brink of potential recession and a Nation fighting terrorism around the world, spend the evening with one of our Country's true leaders, and envision a bold future.

Join Presidential Candidate Joe Sestak
at a Fundraiser on Monday, September 23
hosted by Edward F. Chacker, Esq. and Michael T. Van Der Deen, Esq.

•Former 3-star Admiral; commander of aircraft carrier battle group
•Interacted with Presidents, Parliamentary Members, and leaders of Ministries
•President Clinton’s Director of Defense Policy; head of Navy’s Strategic Anti-Terrorism Unit
•PhD in Political Economy & Government and Masters in Public Administration from Harvard
•Former U.S. Congressman; Vice Chairman, Small Business Committee; most productive Congressperson in his class; saved over 800 homes from foreclosure
•Elected and re-elected (by 20 points) in a 2-1 Republican Congressional District
•Challenged former Republican Senator Arlen Specter and won the primary, after being 40 points down.

Joe launched his presidential campaign on June 23 in Iowa. Only 5 weeks later he was polling at #9.

The editorial board of the Des Moines Register [https://www.desmoinesregister.com/story/opinion/editorials/2019/07/30/joe-sestak-impresses-experience-and-discipline-editorial/1826416001/] said, “[Joe] impresses with experience, smarts and discipline...” and the National Review called him [https://www.nationalreview.com/2019/08/joe-sestak-most-interesting-democrat-you-forgot-was-running/] “the most interesting Democrat” in the race.

Joe’s growing coalition is bringing together Democrats, Independents and Republicans, appealing to a sense of greater national purpose, above party, to heal our nation’s soul. He believes that a nation that can “disagree well” is a nation that can begin to overcome its rifts and tackle our greatest challenges.

Please come and learn more about Joe’s plans to restore trust, unity and accountability in the nation.

Monday, September 23 at 5:30 p.m.
At The Law Offices of Michael T. Van Der Veen
1219 Spruce Street
Philadelphia, PA 19107
Requested Contribution Levels:
Sponsor: $2800 Patron: $1000
Supporter: $500 Friend: $250
To RSVP and/or contribute for this event, click here [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/reception092319]
You can also contribute by bringing a check to the reception or by mailing
a check payable to “Joe Sestak for President” to Joe Sestak for President, PO Box 17246, Alexandria, VA 22302.
Questions or to RSVP (and contribute at the reception): Email reception@joesestak.com or call 610-757-5051

Paid for by Joe Sestak for President

Joe Sestak
P.O Box 17246
Alexandria, VA 22302
United States

subject: Why my son needs to be on stage
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for America
body:
|
---
Tim has always been a gentleman, that's just how I raised him.

The compassionate boy I saw grow up is still Tim -- he's just older and running for President now! He got into politics because he wanted to make a difference, and he's never made me anything but proud.

Tim deserves to be on the next debate stage in Ohio. He's always put our community first, and that sort of voice needs to be heard by a larger audience. [**Can you chip in $3 to get my son to the Ohio debate stage?**](http://secure.timryanforamerica.%3D/?g=i0wvQ1H8x8Va89sNxWeKKQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tr-october?recurring=true&amount=3&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=1+-+Can+you+chip+in+3+to+get+my+son+to+the+O&utm_campaign=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190914_2_4&source=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190914_2_4&refcode=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190914_2_4")

My son cares about families. His policies cut to what's important to people in their everyday lives -- public school, jobs, sanity, he isn't caught up in the average right and left media squabble. **Tim doesn 't care about politics, he just wants to help people.**

We need more people like that. I've gotten the chance to see Tim on the trail, and the way he connects with voters is absolutely unique. When they hear what he has to say, they immediately ask how they can get involved. I want more people to be able to see what I've seen.

Help my son get to the next debate here in Ohio: [**https://secure.timryanforamerica.com/fighting-for-you**](http://secure.timryanforamerica.?g=i0wvQ1H8x8Va89sNxWeKKQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tr-october?recurring=true&amount=3&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=2+-+httpssecuretimryanforamericacomfightingf&utm_campaign=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190914_2_4&source=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190914_2_4&refcode=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190914_2_4")
** **
|

Contribute now to help Tim take his vision for our future across the United States! body:
Deadline: midnight tonight.

| [](http://act.yang2020.com/go/68?t=1&akid=314%2E377263%2EB66qWG) Friend --

Here’s what we’re facing, from the _Washington Post_ :

_**“Candidates for the Democratic presidential nomination are sprinting from coast to coast in search of campaign donations over the next 18 days, moving urgently to stockpile cash...** Joe Biden’s campaign has tentatively arranged at least 16 post-debate fundraisers before the Sept. 30 deadline....Sen. Kamala D. Harris (Calif.) has at least 17 planned. Pete Buttigieg...was scheduled to hold at least 10.”_
This is on top of the billionaire who has already spent millions in the first four states.

**Our campaign is different. While many campaigns rely on big donors and private events to raise a majority of their money -- over 80% of our campaign is funded by grassroots donors giving under $200.**

[**This means we need you to be the difference if we are going to remain competitive. Please rush $10 or anything you can before our midnight mid-month deadline.**](https://act.yang2020.com/go/9195?amount=10&t=2&akid=314%2E377263%2EB66qWG) _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$10 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/9196?t=3&akid=314%2E377263%2EB66qWG)

We know no one in the media or the establishment is going to tell the story of this campaign for us -- we have to do it ourselves.

And to do that we must have the resources to compete with other campaigns that have hundreds of organizers and TV ads on the air in Iowa and New Hampshire.

**[Please, rush $10 or more before midnight so we don’t fall behind the campaigns raising millions from wealthy donors.](https://act.yang2020.com/go/9195?amount=10&t=9&akid=314%2E377263%2EB66qWG)**

Yang2020
**Our end-of-quarter deadline is approaching fast. After it hits, our fundraising numbers will go public for the world to see. Donate now so we can show everyone how powerful this movement is.** | [Contribute](https://act.yang2020.com/go/9195?t=10&akid=314%2E377263%2EB66qWG)

around a note late last night. It’s pretty important and we wanted to make

Thursday night’s debate.

Texas.

message to Cain becomes. So please, make your best donation right now.

- Team Beto

name: Sara Gideon
subject: Brett Kavanaugh
body:
Content warning: This email contains language related to sexual violence.
# [](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802c1c/4bef7a87/68bd46fd/287f00a5/998740541/VEsH/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-email-template?refcode=em_header")

_Content warning: This email contains language related to sexual violence._
Friends,
The _New York Times_ just reported that there was another individual with a story about Brett Kavanaugh's sexual misconduct in college.
They also report that lawyers for one of the women who came forward about Kavanaugh during his confirmation hearing provided the FBI a list of 25 possible witnesses to his misconduct, but the FBI chose not to interview a single person.
**It 's more clear than ever that the investigation into Brett Kavanaugh's past was a complete sham. **
The Republican-controlled Senate imposed strict rules on the FBI, preventing them from expeditiously moving forward with its investigation. But no matter what was uncovered, Republicans were going to vote to confirm him. It wouldn't have mattered.
Despite knowing that the FBI's investigation into his past was wildly incomplete, Susan Collins recently said she didn't regret her vote to confirm Brett Kavanaugh.
She even said she was "sad" that her support for him has cost her support in Maine.
Well Senator Collins, we're sad too.
We're sad that our representative in the U.S. Senate gave this man a lifetime appointment to the Supreme Court without a thorough investigation into his past.
Thank you for reading.
Yours,

body:

| | Hi Peter, Mitch McConnell has been following Trump's every wish and command since he was inaugurated, helping him try to overturn the ACA, forcing through his woefully underqualified and partisan judges, and ensuring Brett Kavanaugh's lifetime appointment to the Supreme Court. He even supported Trump's national emergency declaration on the southern border and ensured a veto override didn't succeed. This is all coming back to bite him, though, because the funds Trump is redirecting from the Pentagon to build his wall are being siphoned from projects in Kentucky, like building a new middle school at Fort Campbell. His constituents are furious, but he continues to follow Trump like a puppy \-- it would explain why his approval rating is at 36%. This is not who we need in the Senate. We need someone who is going to listen to constituents, work with colleagues, and move this country forward. Fortunately, we have just that person in Amy McGrath. Her campaign is already going strong, and even Nate Silver has said that Democrats may finally have a shot at unseating Mitch McConnell. Obviously McConnell will stop at nothing to hold onto this seat. body:

---
| Team, I wanted to make sure you saw Michael's email this morning about our end-of-quarter goal.

I've been checking the numbers in ActBlue, and donations have been coming in slower than usual today. The good news is that we can get back on track to hit our goal if we get another 500 donations before midnight tonight.

[**Can you help? It 's urgent.**](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbafbc/134673f2/a8c9dd3/69963560/3651143552/VEsH/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/teambennet?refcode=EM_FR_B2_091519_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")

Thanks for standing with Michael.

Jess Boad
Finance Director
Bennet for America

**- -- FWD MESSAGE ---**

Friend,

The team just updated me on our end-of-quarter fundraising goal. I'm grateful for how friends and supporters like you are stepping up in a big way to make sure we hit our target.

I'm in this race to fight for the future our kids deserve: a government that works for everyone, not just the wealthy few, public schools that lift people from poverty instead of reinforcing it, swift climate action, not a climate denier in the White House, and universal health coverage NOW.

Since we announced our goal we've made great progress, but there's still a long way to go, and I'd really appreciate your help.

Can you chip in? You can use this link: [**https://secure.michaelbennet.com/EOQ**](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbafbc/134673f2/a8c9dd3/69963560/3651143552/VEsE/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/teambennet?refcode=EM_FR_B2_091519_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")

Your support right now keeps fueling our people-powered campaign. It allows us to get out our message to voters in key states in the crucial weeks ahead.

And, it sends a clear signal we have the strength, grassroots support, resources, and resolve to win the Democratic nomination and take on Donald Trump.

Thanks,

Michael
